messages.subject: [R-SIG-Mac] Problem during startup
messages.body_plain:
Dear all,

I have had trouble with R crashing during the startup. This has happened on two different mac laptops. An old 13" and a new macbook pro running 10.6.4. 
I have looked at the archive on the mailing list and other discussions, but non has helped, i.e. I could not find and .Rdata, history or workspace files.
Since this has happened on two machines by now, help would be much appreciated, otherwise I will run out of money soon.

Many thanks in advance!

All the best, Philipp

P.S. I attach the problem report.

-------------- next part --------------
